Open to Research Collaboration

Zhaorui (Elijah) JIANG

MPhil Student at Peking University | Research Assistant at Monash University | Visiting Student at Laoshan Laboratory

Peking University, Monash University and Laoshan Laboratory

I am interested in developing AI-driven scientific software and algorithms to address meaningful scientific problems in life science and geoscience, with a focus on computational toolkits or systems that support data-driven discovery.

Research Interests
AI for Life Science and Geoscience; Scientific Software and Algorithms
Current Role
First Year MPhil Student
Last Updated
April 08, 2026

News

Oct 2025

OUC-China Team won a Gold Medal at the 2025 iGEM Competition. Project page

May 2025

Invited to give a BCML seminar talk at Heriot-Watt University on genome language models.

Nov 2024

Invited to present BASALT Toolkit at the BCML seminar at Heriot-Watt University.

Sep 2024

Admitted to Peking University and received the National Scholarship.

Aug 2024

Released the first version of the OUC and HWU survival guidance. Repository
